init.title: External Temperature Sensors
init.description: Choose an external Home Assistant temperature sensor for each AC below. Devices: {device_legend}. Leave a field empty to only use the AC's built-in sensor. Selecting a sensor here does not activate it immediately — use the "Use External Temperature Sensor" switch on the AC's dashboard card to switch the active source live.

abort.no_hac_devices: No Dreo air conditioner (HAC) devices were found on this account.
abort.entry_not_loaded: The Dreo integration must finish loading before options can be changed. Reload the integration and try again.

humidity_not_supported_in_mode.message: Humidity control is not supported in the current mode

set_humidity_failed.message: Humidity can only be set in Dry mode

set_rgb_threshold_failed.message: Failed to set RGB humidity threshold

set_temperature_failed.message: Temperature can only be set in Cool mode

turn_off_failed.message: Failed to turn off the device

turn_on_failed.message: Failed to turn on the device
